mapper.sql: id, proj_type_code, midcheck_info, begin_date, end_date, midcheck_state, note, file_id, notify_plan
mapper.select: select spm.id as rowId, proj_type_code as "projTypeCode.id",cspt.name as "projTypeCode.name", midcheck_info as midCheckInfo, begin_date as beginDate, end_date as endDate, midcheck_state as midCheckState, note, file_id as fileId, notify_plan as notifyPlan from srm_project_midcheck_list_info spm left join ct_srm_proj_type cspt on cspt.code=spm.proj_type_code where spm.id=#{rowId}

select id,midcheck_info as name from srm_project_midcheck_list_info where midcheck_state=2
and midcheck_info LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
